creator: j@scre.ws
text:
diff -ruN naim.old/Makefile naim/Makefile
--- naim.old/Makefile   2007-08-15 22:03:05.000000000 -0700
+++ naim/Makefile       2007-08-15 21:29:48.000000000 -0700
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # Date created:                        02 March 1999
 # Whom:                                mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/net-im/naim/Makefile,v 1.56 2007/07/23 09:36:20 rafan Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #

 PORTNAME=      naim
-PORTVERSION=   0.11.8.2.1
+PORTVERSION=   0.11.8.3.1
 CATEGORIES=    net-im irc
 MASTER_SITES=  http://naim.googlecode.com/files/

diff -ruN naim.old/distinfo naim/distinfo
--- naim.old/distinfo   2007-08-15 22:03:05.000000000 -0700
+++ naim/distinfo       2007-08-15 21:06:48.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

-SHA256 (naim-0.11.8.2.1.tar.bz2) = 7aa6f1484add6539fe15b3449337f5305ece32a0550f3d47f02021a47abee560
-SIZE (naim-0.11.8.2.1.tar.bz2) = 419133
